owned_files.notes: 12 .rs files: bloom, camera, floating_origin, hologram, mesh, mod, multi_scale, particles, pipeline, shader_loader, sky, stars. Largest: mod.rs (833), camera.rs (773), hologram.rs (576), stars.rs (366), bloom.rs (353), sky.rs (345), particles.rs (331).

36 WGSL shaders + procedural/ subdirectory. Includes pbr.wgsl, bloom.wgsl, particle.wgsl, planet shaders (earth/mars/moon/sun/etc.), procedural materials (steel, drywall, granite, plank_wood, polished_concrete, rubber_flooring, carpet_tile).

gaps: Shadow mapping not implemented (depth pass exists for camera depth buffer only)
Frustum culling absent — all objects iterate every frame in render loop
Sun direction not auto-wired to renderer.set_sun_light() from sky.rs
Camera collision with ship floors disabled (commented out)
Instanced rendering inside batch still uses per-draw uniform writes (no true GPU instancing)
todos_found: src/renderer/camera.rs:657 — TODO: re-enable when we have proper collision with ship floors
src/renderer/sky.rs:63 — TODO: Wire sun direction to renderer.set_sun_light()
summary: Renderer is feature-complete for PBR + bloom + particles + hologram + sky + stars. Shadow mapping, frustum culling, true GPU instancing, and post-processing improvements remain as documented active gaps.
